category_sources: source_facts.description says Brush is Bourne RUsty SHell, a command interpreter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is brush; source_facts.homepage points to the official reubeno/brush repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official Brush repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/reubeno/brush; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a shell/command interpreter; source_facts.executables and current_curation.tags indicate CLI usage.
